name: pi-laconic
description_en: Laconic for Pi: ultra-compressed agent output that preserves technical substance. Three intensity modes, slash commands, natural-language activation, and a session statusline. Inspired by caveman.
description_zh: Pi 的 Laconic：超压缩的代理输出，保留技术实质内容。三种强度模式、斜杠命令、自然语言激活和会话状态行。灵感来自 caveman。
